items.markdown:
The distance between Tirupati and Arunachalam (Thiruvannamalai) is approximately **190–200 km** by road . The journey typically takes **3.5 to 5 hours** , depending on traffic and vehicle. Major transportation options include private taxis (approx. ₹2,700–₹3,500) and direct buses (APSRTC/SETC).[[1]](https://tirupatibalajitourstravels.com/tirupati-to-arunachalam-distance/)[[2]](https://www.redbus.in/bus-tickets/tirupathi-to-arunachalam)[[3]](https://cabbazar.com/taxi/cab/tirupati-to-arunachalam)[[4]](https://go2onewaytaxi.com/tirupati-to-arunachalam-cab/)[[5]](https://www.rome2rio.com/s/Tirumala/Arunachala)[[6]](https://www.abhibus.com/bus-tickets/apsrtc-tirupathi-tiruvannamalai-bus-booking)

Key Travel Information

- **Distance:**≈is approximately equal to≈ 190-200 km via NH38 or local state highways.
- **Travel Time:** 3 hours 55 minutes to 5 hours.
- **Best Route:** Usually via Puttur - Nagari - Kanchipuram - Vandavasi - Thiruvannamalai.
- **Alternative Options:** 
	- **Cab/Taxi:** The fastest and most comfortable option, taking about 4 hours.
	- **Bus:** Regular bus services are available from Tirupati, taking around 4h 15m.
	- **Train:** Daily train services exist, taking approximately 3h 48m to 5 hours.[[1]](https://www.redbus.in/bus-tickets/tirupathi-to-arunachalam)[[2]](https://cabbazar.com/taxi/cab/tirupati-to-arunachalam)[[3]](https://www.rome2rio.com/s/Tirupati/Arunachala)[[4]](https://www.makemytrip.com/routeplanner/tirupati-thiruvannamalai.html)[[5]](https://www.railyatri.in/tirupati-to-tiruvannamalai-trains)

Key Locations on Route

- **Kanchipuram:** Known as the "City of Thousand Temples."
- **Vellore:** Famous for the Sri Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple.
- **Kanipakam:** Known for the Kanipakam Vinayaka Temple.

*Note: It is highly recommended to plan for an early morning start to avoid traffic around Kanchipuram and ensure a smoother drive, particularly during special pooja days at the Arunachaleswara Temple.*
